channel.title: Build5nines.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Build5nines.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Big Thinkers: Guido van Rossum – How Python Became the Connective Tissue of Modern Infrastructure and AI
item.description: Few programming languages have crossed as many technology boundaries as Python. It powers machine learning platforms, cloud automation, observability tooling, scientific research, infrastructure orchestration, cybersecurity… Link to article: https://build5nines.com/big-thinkers-guido-van-rossum-how-python-became-the-connective-tissue-of-modern-infrastructure-and-ai/

item.title: Azure Bicep Has a Plan Mode: Use It On Your Next Production Deployment
item.description: Infrastructure as code makes cloud environments repeatable, but repeatability does not automatically make deployments safe. A small Bicep change can have consequences far beyond the… Link to article: https://build5nines.com/azure-bicep-has-a-plan-mode-use-it-on-your-next-production-deployment/

item.title: Conditional & Iterative Deployments with Azure Bicep
item.description: Every team eventually reaches the point where their Infrastructure as Code stops being “a few clean resource declarations” and starts becoming a living model of… Link to article: https://build5nines.com/conditional-iterative-deployments-with-azure-bicep/

item.title: Big Thinkers: Brendan Gregg – How Systems Performance Engineering Shaped Modern Observability
item.description: Modern cloud platforms generate enormous amounts of telemetry. Metrics stream from Kubernetes clusters, traces flow through distributed APIs, logs accumulate in petabytes, and dashboards glow… Link to article: https://build5nines.com/big-thinkers-brendan-gregg-how-systems-performance-engineering-shaped-modern-observability/
